description: About 5-6 inches long. Olive back, yellow breast and chest, olive wings, yellow eye stripe and black below (but not across) the eye. Slightly darker cap. Apparent black band across chest is actually a split in the feathers. Probable point of impact.Behaviors: N/ACall: N/APlumage: Breeding
